overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic video game showing a slow walk through a toxic fog-filled ruined city street. The environment features crumbling concrete buildings, broken asphalt, and a small creature near a fence, with a green radioactive haze reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined residential street under toxic green fog

agents.ego_description: walking slowly down the center of the ruined street with a weapon visible in the lower left corner, maintaining steady forward movement through the toxic environment

notable_agents.action: small mutant creature or dog standing near the iron fence, visible only during the first three seconds before being passed

entered.detail: tall crumbling concrete building with broken windows and damaged facade
black metal fence running along the sidewalk edge
tall wooden telephone pole with crossbars, standing in the middle distance
damaged multi-story building with missing walls and debris
leafless tree with bare branches visible behind the fence line
broken pavement with cracks and scattered debris covering the road surface

segments.scene_description: A steady forward walk through a post-apocalyptic urban street engulfed in thick green toxic fog. Crumbling concrete apartment buildings line both sides of the cracked asphalt road, with a wooden utility pole standing prominently in the center distance. A small mutant creature is visible near the iron fence on the left at the start of the segment before being left behind as the camera advances through the desolate environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression through a desolate urban street engulfed in a thick, radioactive green haze. It begins by passing a small mutant creature lingering near an iron fence on the left, as the camera advances along a road of cracked asphalt. As the movement continues, the view is framed by the oppressive presence of crumbling concrete apartment buildings that line both sides of the street. The scene then pushes deeper into the toxic fog, moving steadily toward a solitary wooden utility pole that stands prominently in the center distance.
